codeReview.summary: The feature covers most required surfaces (dynamic prompt builder, 4-step onboarding UI, profile-aware /api/generate), but onboarding redirect logic is broken by a request/response header mismatch, which can trap new users in repeated redirects to /onboarding.

issues.description: Dashboard layout reads `x-pathname` from `headers()` (request headers), but middleware writes `x-pathname` on `response.headers` (`content-os/src/middleware.ts:30`). As a result `pathname` can be empty, `skipOnboarding` stays false even on `/onboarding`, and users without `creator_profile` are redirected to `/onboarding` while already on `/onboarding`.

Onboarding performs direct client-side DB mutations (`creator_profile` and `user_settings` upserts). Mission conventions require mutations through API routes, so this implementation diverges from documented data-access boundaries.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker marked `followedProcedure: true`, but no agent-browser/manual UI verification appears in evidence for this UI-heavy feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: fullstack-worker skill requires agent-browser/manual checks for UI work (`.factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md:23,50-55`). Transcript skeleton check returned `contains("agent-browser") == false`, and handoff verification contains only `npm run build` and `npm run lint`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mutation boundary documentation and implementation are out of sync; client-side writes are still being introduced.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS says mutations must go through API routes (`/Users/anirudhmanjesh/.factory/missions/fbcce583-7257-4bc1-9707-8c0ee4dcc7ec/AGENTS.md:44-47`) and architecture repeats this invariant (`/Users/anirudhmanjesh/hackathons/content-os/.factory/library/architecture.md:109`), but onboarding writes via client SDK upserts (`content-os/src/app/(dashboard)/onboarding/page.tsx:138-168`).

summary: Review failed due to a blocking onboarding redirect defect caused by relying on a middleware response header in server-component request headers. Dynamic prompt and onboarding structure are present, but redirect correctness must be fixed for the feature to satisfy expected behavior.
